summary: Lead accepts M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 after writer R2 repaired the QA-blocking locale-family canonicalization defect, systems_architect accepted the R2 client-only boundary, and independent qa_reviewer accepted R2 verification. The accepted implementation adds the client-side i18n foundation for system, en-US, and zh-CN; en/en-* canonicalize to en-US, zh/zh-* canonicalize to zh-CN for the current supported surface; persisted regional values migrate to canonical supported preferences; localStorage getItem/setItem failures do not block Web shell boot; and language switching remains a UI/session concern that does not change authoritative simulation state, command history, save data, AI behavior, protocol DTOs, map authority, Electron IPC/preload, or dependency manifests.

tests_run.result: Format check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.
Web build passed with existing large chunk warnings.
Storybook build passed with existing plugin timing and large chunk warnings.
M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 remains REVIEW before lead acceptance state update; downstream UI/localization tasks remain DRAFT.
Ready candidates remain M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.
Writer R1, systems R1, QA R1, writer R2, systems R2, and QA R2 handoffs validated.

decisions.decision: Accept M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 and proceed to PR integration after all required independent review and validation evidence passed.
Full player-mode string cleanup, no-debug-string coverage, and broad no-bare-key UI regression remain assigned to downstream M7 UI quality tasks and do not block this foundation task.

risks.summary: All zh-* tags intentionally map to zh-CN for the current supported locale surface. This is not completed Traditional Chinese or region-specific Chinese support.
risks.mitigation: Future zh-Hant, zh-TW, zh-HK, or additional locale support requires a separate approved task or Human Gate.

risks.summary: The i18n foundation is accepted before full UI text cleanup.
risks.mitigation: Downstream M7 app shell, map, inspector, appointment, guidance, regression matrix, and UI-localization exit tasks retain final coverage responsibility.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 only after the accepted commits enter origin/main.
